sections.heading: Risk Factors
sections.content: The source identifies risk factors for testicular germ cell tumors, not Soft Tissue Sarcoma. These include personal or family history of testicular cancer and cryptorchidism. The text does not list other known risk factors such as radiation exposure, genetic syndromes, or environmental factors specific to soft tissue sarcomas.

cards.factor: Personal or family history of testicular cancer
cards.detail: Personal or family history of testicular cancer
